info.name: Microsoft Endpoint Configuration Management Intune Data Warehouse API
Microsoft Endpoint Configuration Management List device records

params.name: api-version
params.description: API version. Use 'v1.0' for stable or 'beta' for preview features.

params.name: $top
params.description: Number of items to return.

params.name: $skip
params.description: Number of items to skip.

params.name: $filter
params.description: OData filter expression. Only DateKey or RowLastModifiedDateTimeUTC may be supported for filtering depending on the collection.

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include.

params.name: maxhistorydays
params.description: Maximum number of days of history to retrieve. Only takes effect for collections that include dateKey as part of their key property.

items.docs: Retrieve historical device records from the Data Warehouse. Returns daily snapshots of device properties including enrollment status, compliance state, and OS information.

info.name: Microsoft Endpoint Configuration Management List device property histories

params.description: Maximum number of days of history to retrieve. Only takes effect for collections that include dateKey as part of their key property.

items.docs: Retrieve historical device property snapshots. Contains daily snapshots of device-level data for the configured history window.
